sections.paragraph: m. iron, quadril. from the Ch. בְּרַו to transfix. with the addition of ל, compare כַּרְמֶל from כֶּרֶם, חַרְגַּל from חָרַג. Ch. בַּרְזֶל & פַּרְזֶל, Syr. ܦܰܪܙܠܳ. Gen 4:22 Eze 27:12, 19 Eze 27:19, etc. It is often used to denote hardness and firmness, as שֵׁבֶט בַּרְזֶל of a hard rule, Psa 2:9. Isa 48:4, גִּיד בַּרְזֶל עָרְפֶךָ “thy neck (is) an iron sinew,” said of the obstinacy of the people. Specially, an instrument of iron, Deu 27:5 Jos 8:31 2Ki 6:5 a bond of iron, Psa 105:18 fully כֶּבֶל בַּרְזֶל 149:8 .
